subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Muhammad, the Messenger of God, came in times past, yet was He denied by the wrongdoers - some turned away from Him, and some [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اتی محمد رسول الله من قبل انکره الظالمون منهم من اعرض عنه و منهم من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God
